fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: From Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first item entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last item entry number in the register.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the entries in the register were posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch, a personalized journal layout, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Creation Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the entries in the register were posted.

fields.name: From Phys. Inventory Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first physical inventory ledger entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Phys. Inventory Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last physical inventory ledger entry number in the register.

fields.name: From Value Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first value entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Value Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last value entry number in this register.

fields.name: From Capacity Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first capacity entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Capacity Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last capacity ledger entry number in this register.
